title: Randomized Phase 3 Trial of Radiosurgery for Brain Metastases
original_title: Randomized Phase 3 Trial of Radiosurgery for Brain Metastases
abstract: In this randomized phase 3 trial, N=420 patients with brain metastases were assigned to radiosurgery or whole-brain radiotherapy. Overall survival HR 0.82 (95% CI 0.70-0.96) and cognitive decline was 18% lower.

title: Machine Learning Model for Radiotherapy Toxicity Prediction
original_title: Machine Learning Model for Radiotherapy Toxicity Prediction
abstract: A multicenter model trained on 12,000 patients predicted grade 2 toxicity with AUC=0.86 and calibration slope of 0.94.

title: Proton Therapy Versus IMRT for Head and Neck Cancer
original_title: Proton Therapy Versus IMRT for Head and Neck Cancer
abstract: N=310 patients were treated with proton therapy or IMRT. Grade 3 xerostomia was 9% versus 19%, p=0.01.

title: GLP-1 Receptor Agonist and Heart Failure Outcomes
original_title: GLP-1 Receptor Agonist and Heart Failure Outcomes
abstract: A randomized trial of 3,100 participants found hospitalization for heart failure was reduced, HR 0.76 (95% CI 0.61-0.95).

title: Large Language Models for Clinical Trial Matching
original_title: Large Language Models for Clinical Trial Matching
abstract: The foundation model matched patients to trials with sensitivity 91% and specificity 84% across 2,400 cases.

title: Hypofractionated Radiotherapy for Localized Prostate Cancer
original_title: Hypofractionated Radiotherapy for Localized Prostate Cancer
abstract: N=860 patients received hypofractionated radiotherapy or conventional treatment; biochemical control was 92% versus 90%.

title: Glioblastoma Adaptive Radiotherapy Planning Study
abstract: Among 144 patients with glioblastoma, adaptive radiotherapy reduced normal brain V30 by 12% while maintaining target coverage.

title: Influenza Vaccine Effectiveness in Older Adults
original_title: Influenza Vaccine Effectiveness in Older Adults
abstract: A public health study of 88,000 participants found vaccine effectiveness was 48% against hospitalization.
